backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the blog platform backend with types for BlogPost, UserProfile, and images, plus CRUD operations for posts, user profiles, and comments with role-based access control (admin/user).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the InnerLift Wellness logo image is displayed in the Navigation and Footer components, with high confidence based on referenced source files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each page, component, hook, and config file in the React application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the InnerLift Wellness app, setting metadata, favicon, theme color, page title, and mounting the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (public, blog, admin, category, and sub-category pages), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a button to navigate home, used when a user lacks admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Passthrough wrapper component for admin routes that renders children directly without any authentication guard, relying on the backend to enforce permissions.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sidebar component for the blog that provides a search input, a list of popular published posts, and a category navigation list with links.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment section for a blog post, displaying existing comments and a form to submit new ones using author name and text fields, with optional pre-loaded comments prop.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a featured blog post as a large card with an overlay image, title, excerpt, metadata, and a link to the full article.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, social media links, quick navigation links, category links, and legal page links.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components in a full-height flex layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop dropdown for categories, main nav links, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a blog post summary card with thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, metadata, and a read-more link.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input component with clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown list of search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape), category badges, and click-to-navigate behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including fetching blog posts, comments, and images, as well as mutations for creating, updating, and deleting posts and comments.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook that provides client-side search over a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering by title, category, and keywords based on a user-supplied query string.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and defines shared utility and component classes for the AyurGlow brand.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component that displays the AyurGlow Secrets mission, philosophy, and core values using a hero section, two-column layout, and an icon-based values grid.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all blog posts with options to create, edit, delete, and toggle publish state, using mutation hooks and toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts as cards with featured images, metadata, and excerpts, alongside a sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post that renders content with inline image markers replaced, displays metadata and tags, and includes a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post, supporting title, slug, category, content, tags, featured image upload, and inline image insertion with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating all fields including featured and inline images from the fetched post data, then submitting updates via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: Detail page listing four Ayurvedic dandruff and scalp care remedies, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency, rendered as styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: Detail page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies for preventing and reversing premature grey hair, each card showing ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: Detail page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair fall treatment remedies with ingredients, step-by-step application, benefits, and recommended frequency, displayed as cards under a hero section.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: Detail page featuring four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies (oil blends, masks, protein treatments) with full ingredient lists, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency rendered as cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: Displays a hair care page featuring five Ayurvedic oil treatments and hair masks (e.g., Hot Oil Treatment, Brahmi-Amla Oil, Banana-Avocado Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section with a back-link to the Hair Care index.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static category landing page for Hair Care that displays a hero section and a grid of subcategory cards linking to specific hair care remedy pages.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Renders a simple health remedies page with four natural remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management (Fenugreek Water, Bitter Gourd Juice, Cinnamon-Honey Tonic, Garlic-Lemon). Displays ingredients, application steps, benefits, and a medical disclaimer.

A more styled version of the Diabetes & BP support page using Card components and an Alert disclaimer, listing four remedies (Fenugreek Seeds Water, Karela Juice, Cinnamon Tea, Garlic-Ginger) with preparation steps and benefits. Includes a hero section with a back-link to Health Remedies.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Displays a styled digestion and gut health page with four Ayurvedic remedies (Triphala Churna, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, Ajwain Water, Buttermilk with Cumin) using Card components, including preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions. Includes a hero section with a back-link to Health Remedies.

A simpler digestive health remedies page listing four remedies (Triphala Powder, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, CCF Tea, Ajwain Water) with icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Uses basic card-style divs without the shared Card component library.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: An alternative immunity-boosting remedies page using shadcn Card components, featuring a hero section with a back-navigation link and four similar Ayurvedic remedies rendered with structured benefits lists and usage instructions.

Displays four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (Turmeric Golden Milk, Tulsi-Ginger Tea, Chyawanprash Tonic, Amla-Honey Shot) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency using a simple card layout with inline black text styling.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Displays four Ayurvedic stress-relief and sleep remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, Almond-Saffron Milk) with icons, ingredients, application steps, and frequency in a card-based layout.

An alternative stress and sleep solutions page using shadcn Card components with a purple-themed hero section, back-navigation link, and four Ayurvedic remedies including benefits lists and usage instructions.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Displays four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul, Ginger-Green Tea, Cabbage-Carrot Juice) with icons, ingredients, application steps, and frequency in a standard card layout.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies category page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes & BP, Stress & Sleep) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the site's home page featuring a hero banner, category cards for Health Remedies/Skin Care/Hair Care, benefit highlights, stats, and a latest blog posts section fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Da: Displays a page of Ayurvedic daily routine practices (Dinacharya, Abhyanga, Evening Wind-Down) with step-by-step instructions, benefits, frequency, and duration for each. Includes a hero section with a back link to the Lifestyle & Wellness section.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Mo: Renders a page detailing four Ayurvedic morning rituals (Oil Pulling, Tongue Scraping, Warm Lemon Water, Abhyanga) with steps, benefits, and frequency. Features a gradient hero section and links back to the Lifestyle & Wellness page.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Yo: Presents four yoga and meditation practices (Pranayama, Sun Salutation, Mindfulness Meditation, Yoga Nidra) with detailed step-by-step instructions, benefits, and session duration. Includes a hero section linking back to Lifestyle & Wellness.
frontend/src/pages/LifestyleWellnessPage: Displays the Lifestyle & Wellness category page with a hero section, a grid of three subcategory cards (Morning Rituals, Yoga & Meditation, Daily Routines), and an informational blurb about Ayurvedic Dinacharya.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page with styled cards covering introduction, automatically collected information, and user-provided data sections, along with a back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Displays a skin care page with four natural acne remedies (Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water Paste, Aloe Vera-Lemon Gel), each listing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section with a back link to the Skin Care section.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Renders an acne treatment page with four Ayurvedic remedies (Neem-Turmeric Paste, Tea Tree-Aloe Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rosewater Pack, Cinnamon-Honey Mask), each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Uses a simpler layout without a back-navigation hero section.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Displays a page of Ayurvedic anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Serum, Avocado Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for each.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Renders a collection of DIY face pack recipes (e.g., Multani Mitti, Besan-Turmeric) categorized by skin type, with ingredients, steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Shows natural glow remedies using Ayurvedic ingredients (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Mask, Saffron-Milk Treatment) with ingredients, application instructions, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Presents a styled page with Card components for pigmentation and dark spot remedies, including a hero section with a back-navigation link and remedy cards listing ingredients, steps, and benefits.
Displays pigmentation reduction remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Mask, Orange Peel Mask) with a sun-protection warning banner, ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care category page with a hero section and a grid of five subcategory cards (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) linking to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Renders the Terms of Service page with a medical disclaimer alert and styled cards covering agreement terms and website usage policy, including a back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Fat: Displays a page of Ayurvedic fat-burning drink remedies (e.g., lemon-honey water, green tea with ginger) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Met: Displays a page of Ayurvedic metabolism-boosting remedies (e.g., Triphala-Guggul blend, turmeric tonic) with ingredients, steps, benefits, and usage details.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Wei: Displays a page of Ayurvedic weight-loss recipes (e.g., moong dal soup, oats-chia breakfast) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
Landing page for the Weight Management category displaying a hero section and three subcategory cards (Fat Burning Drinks, Metabolism Boosters, Healthy Weight Loss Recipes) with links to their respective routes.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Provides utility functions for converting ExternalBlob objects to display URLs and replacing inline image markers (e.g., `{{inline-image:N}}`) in HTML content with actual `` tags.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with optional sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animations for the AyurGlow application.
project_state.json: Tracks the InnerLift Wellness website project state, including existing features (logo in navigation), pending feature requests (full site build and new logo), and image requirements for the logo and favicon.
